title: 🌟 Basic Overlapping Intervals

title: 🤝 Touching Boundaries Merge Together
description: 📌 Combine intervals that meet exactly at the boundary point.

description: ✨ Merge connected intervals regardless of their original ordering.

description: ⛓️ Combine multiple overlapping intervals into larger continuous ranges.

title: ✅ Already Merged Intervals
description: 📋 Return intervals unchanged when no overlaps exist.

title: 🎯 Single Interval Case
description: 🟢 Handle cases where only one interval is provided.

title: 🌪️ All Intervals Overlap
description: 🔥 Collapse completely overlapping intervals into one range.

title: 📍 Same Starting Points
description: 🚀 Merge intervals sharing the same starting point with the largest ending range.

title: 🧱 Adjacent and Separate Blocks
description: ⚖️ Merge connected intervals while preserving independent ranges.

title: 🏆 Large Range Coverage
description: 🌍 Keep the widest interval when smaller ranges are fully covered.

title: 🌀 Completely Nested Intervals
description: 🏰 Merge intervals that are fully contained inside a larger range.

title: 🌱 Small Consecutive Ranges
description: 🔗 Combine a sequence of touching intervals into one continuous range.

title: 🎭 Mixed Overlapping and Independent Intervals
description: 🧩 Handle a mixture of merged groups and standalone intervals.

title: 🚦 Unsorted Interval Collection
description: 🔄 Merge intervals correctly even when input order is random.

title: 🌊 Large Overlap Expansion
description: 📈 Expand the merged range when later intervals extend coverage.

title: 🧊 No Overlap Between Ranges
description: ❄️ Preserve all intervals when every range is independent.

title: 🎯 Duplicate Intervals
description: ♻️ Collapse identical intervals into a single range.

title: 🪄 Single Point Intervals
description: 📍 Merge intervals containing the same boundary points.

title: 🌋 Gradually Expanding Intervals
description: 🔥 Combine overlapping intervals that continuously extend the range.

title: 🏹 Wide Gaps Between Intervals
description: 🌌 Keep distant intervals separate when no overlap exists.

title: 🧮 Maximum Constraint Size Sample
description: ⚡ Validate merging behavior across large interval ranges.

title: 🎨 Alternating Overlap Pattern
description: 🔗 Merge intervals that bridge previously separated ranges.
